components.name: Evidence Card
components.description: Event evidence card with body crop, overlaid face crop, time, location, and model status.
components.html: 记录12026-06-21 11:09:37教学楼东门 · CAM-001
components.css: .ds-evidence-card{display:grid;gap:8px;padding:10px;border:1px solid #DFE6F1;border-radius:8px;background:#fff;font-family:'Segoe UI','Microsoft YaHei',Arial,sans-serif}.ds-evidence-card strong{color:#142033}.ds-evidence-card span{color:#66758A;font-size:12px}.ds-evidence-image{position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3;border-radius:6px;background:#EEF4FF}.ds-face-thumb{position:absolute;right:8px;top:8px;width:42px;height:42px;border:2px solid #fff;border-radius:6px;background:#CDD8E8;box-shadow:0 6px 14px rgba(15,23,42,.18)}

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact model-state chip for exact match, similar result, unknown, or confidence labels.

narrative.overview: GKGuard C2 is a controlled evidence desk for campus-security review: left-side navigation, a stable work surface, precise filters, visible candidate uncertainty, and evidence imagery at the center of attention.
keyCharacteristics: Fixed left navigation with two primary entries.
Evidence imagery and route context are the main visual material.
Candidate comparison and event details use right-side drawers to preserve context.
Status labels are concise and model-aware.
Responsive behavior reorganizes panels instead of shrinking text.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Operational Blue is the only general-purpose accent and must stay under roughly 10% of a screen.

rules.name: The Evidence Contrast Rule
rules.body: Evidence images are never placed on decorative gradients; they sit on neutral surfaces or Evidence Black.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Product text uses fixed rem/px sizes; do not use viewport-scaled headings.

dos: Do keep the fixed left navigation and right work area as the primary shell.
Do put event evidence, route context, and model metadata ahead of decoration.
Do show "无法判断" for unknown attributes.
donts: Don't create a marketing hero, homepage overview, or generic dashboard landing screen.
Don't use large gradients, glassmorphism, neon security aesthetics, or decorative metric cards.
Don't describe model output as "已确认本人", "绝对匹配", or equivalent certainty.
